subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-10-25 in Ramleh
subcodes.first_line: When I was in America and Europe I went through some of the Zoological gardens... My grandfather had many colored maids and servants. When the Blessed Perfection became the head of the family
subcodes.subjects: @race unity; racial issues, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @stories; anecdotes
